name: orion_crew_life_v1
about: Canonical crew-life parameters for Orion Station, extracted from canon/L1/station/reference_sources/orion_station_life_infrastructure.md (THE RHYTHM OF STATION LIFE, FOOD/WATER/HYGIENE SYSTEMS) and the technical addendum (Carmen Rivas post-shift routine). Drives tools/crew_life.py. Clock is the canonical 24h-labeled station timeline; the 22.1h station-day datum in the environment packet is an open reconciliation (see _clock_note).
_clock_note: Shift labels and the daily rhythm use a 24h clock per the life-infrastructure doc. The environment packet records a 22.1h station day; until reconciled, this model treats an hour as a station-hour on the canonical rhythm and flags the discrepancy rather than silently picking one.
_shift_note: Each shift sleeps ~7h ending shortly before its watch (Alpha 22-05/work06; Bravo 05-12/work14; Charlie 14-21/work22; Delta 18-01/work02), staggered so the habitat is never fully asleep.
